mentions.note: Stock under pressure but Cramer views as wrong; today's rally is correct direction; company is a buy.

E-commerce platform down 26% Q1; great business, tremendous growth, impressive profitability; but 64x earnings multiple too high—market won't pay multiples anymore. No compelling AI disruption case; mission-critical for SMBs but valuation unjustified.
AI displacement fears unjustified for SMB-focused platform; 30%+ revenue growth, undervalued at 62x earnings, seasonal rally setup intact.
Universal fulfillment company; great read on small to medium-sized business health. Stock meandering but expected good numbers. Monitor Tuesday earnings.
34% revenue growth; stock plummeted from 182 to 105 on guidance slowdown to high 20s; first choice for SMB e-commerce remains unchanged—high-quality company now de-risked.

Trading at 1.9x forward growth after 38% year decline; exceptional fundamentals (GMV +35%, revenue +34%, operating income +88%, free cash flow +31%) masked by AI displacement panic; enterprise migration (LVMH, Mulberry, Balmain, Rag & Bone, BevMo, Orvis) and hands-on service moat provide competitive advantage; 15 consecutive revenue beats; would add on weakness at $92–87.
